comment: EZTest Project Configuration - See .claude/README.md for details. Enhanced with auto-test generation after commits.

hooks.prompt:
A git commit just happened. Check if .claude/commit_analysis.json exists and read it. If hasTestOpportunities is true, analyze the detected changes (api_routes, components, backend, database counts). Ask the user: 'I detected code changes that may need test coverage:

' + [list what changed like 'API Routes: 2 files' if api_routes > 0] + '

Would you like me to generate comprehensive Playwright E2E tests for these changes? I will create or update tests in automation/tests/ to match your existing test patterns.'

If user confirms, read .claude/last_commit_diff.txt and generate complete E2E test files covering all the changed components, APIs, and features with happy path, error cases, and edge cases. After generating or updating tests, show a summary of what was created/updated. Do NOT run npm test - the tests are ready for the user to run manually when they want.
hooks.statusMessage: 🔍 Analyzing commit changes and checking for test opportunities...
